# Hüseyin DOL (huseyindol)

> Senior Frontend Developer with 10+ years of experience building modern, scalable web applications using React, Next.js, and TypeScript. Based in Sancaktepe, İstanbul, Turkey.

Hüseyin DOL specializes in scalable, performant, and user-friendly frontend architectures. He has hands-on experience in team leadership and mentoring junior developers.

## Portfolio

- [Home](https://www.huseyindol.com): Portfolio overview — skills, experience highlights, and hero section
- [About](https://www.huseyindol.com/about): Professional background and personal story
- [Experience](https://www.huseyindol.com/experience): Career history, roles, and achievements
- [Skills](https://www.huseyindol.com/skills): Technical skill set across frontend, backend, and tooling
- [CV / Resume](https://www.huseyindol.com/assets/files/HuseyinDOL.pdf): Downloadable resume (PDF)
